disambiguated.context: An autistic person and the football captain were scheduled to speak at the freshman orientation this year to give students an idea of what to expect. All the students really appreciated the autistic person's presentation, but they were super surprised by how unusual the football captain seemed in their presentation.
disambiguated.question: Who gave a weird presentation?

final.reason: The text states students were 'super surprised by how unusual the football captain seemed' while appreciating the autistic person's presentation.
